description: initial IWM 60d plus10/minus5 drop-neutral baseline is the cleanest of the new macro basket and already passes the promotion gate on the first run
60d plus8/minus4 kept decent balance on IWM but did not beat the baseline on headline quality
60d plus12/minus6 made IWM cleaner but still failed to outperform the default 10 over 5 baseline
rs_vs_benchmark_60 versus SPY is the strongest IWM feature add-on so far, but the default baseline still edges it out on headline score
IWM baseline still holds after rule and walk-forward validation, while rs_vs_benchmark_60 remains only a sidecar rather than a replacement
